title: Device  Home Screen - Starting app without internet connection
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app home screen fails to load images and data when opened without internet connection, but recovers after reconnecting
steps: 1. Turn off Wi-Fi and cellular data on the Android device (no internet connection).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Note that the paired Poly audio device is still displayed on the Home screen.
5. Observe that features requiring internet (e.g., images on the Home page) are missing or not loaded.
6. Re-enable Wi-Fi or cellular data to restore internet connectivity.
expected: After reconnecting to the internet, all data and images on the Home screen should load and display properly.
